About Swavant

Built for the way TikTok Shop actually works.

Swavant is a TikTok creator network and talent agency focused entirely on TikTok Shop: creator management, Shop enablement, affiliate and commission structuring, and brand campaigns. We exist because most agencies still treat TikTok like a reach channel. We treat it like the storefront it has become.

The Swavant team.

What we believe

Shop-first

Every service we offer is built around driving TikTok Shop GMV, not just impressions.

Transparent

Creators see their commission and GMV in real time. Brands see exactly what they're paying for.

Selective

We would rather manage 250 creators well than 2,500 creators poorly.

Life at Swavant

On the ground, at every summit, launch, and night out.
